biomass_source.name: USDA Forest Service Jenkins generalized biomass equations

itree_status.name: i-Tree
itree_status.api_integration: not implemented; no public unauthenticated carbon-estimate API was confirmed during review

location_calibration.reason: No official Colorado county/ZIP species-specific annual DBH growth table is present in this repo.
location_calibration.current_behavior: County and ZIP apply an experimental local growth multiplier. Outputs remain planning estimates and are not carbon-credit validated.

remaining_validation_needed: Confirm native-species catalog against CSU/CSFS or Colorado Native Plant Society source.
Calibrate annual DBH growth by species and Colorado region from i-Tree output, official growth tables, or repeated local inventory measurements.
Compare sample outputs against i-Tree Eco/Design/MyTree for the same species, DBH, and location.
Add uncertainty ranges before public-facing claims.
